achievements.desc: Built him out of meat cubes.

Bethany
achievements.desc: Beat Hard mode as Lazarus without losing a life

achievements.title: Jacob and Esau
achievements.desc: You are just like your father...

achievements.desc: Get that song out of her head.

achievements.desc: Complete the final chapter with Magdalene.

achievements.desc: Complete the final chapter with Cain.

achievements.desc: Complete the final chapter with Eve.

achievements.desc: Complete the final chapter with Lazarus.

achievements.title: C Section
achievements.desc: Complete the final chapter with Lilith.

achievements.desc: Complete the final chapter with Bethany.

achievements.title: Member Card
achievements.desc: Spend 40+ pennies in a single shop.

achievements.title: Golden Razor
achievements.desc: Obtain 99 pennies. Then spend every single one of them.

achievements.title: The Laws of Physics Are Mere Suggestions, Vol. 1
Eat an Entire Bear
achievements.desc: Kill a bear and eat it. Just eat an entire bear.

achievements.title: To Thine Own Self Be True
achievements.desc: Wear your own severed face on your face.

achievements.title: Friend to Fungi
achievements.desc: Host three different fungal infections at once.

achievements.title: Goat Simulator
achievements.desc: Project your mind into a goat's body.

achievements.title: Your Better Half
achievements.desc: Get killed by your evil twin.

achievements.title: The Spirit of Vengeance
achievements.desc: Recover the Ruin of House Isner.

achievements.title: Love at First Sign
achievements.desc: Fall in love with a sign.

achievements.title: You Are What You Eat
achievements.desc: Eat one of your own limbs.

achievements.title: Shoot.
achievements.desc: Get killed by a chute crab.

achievements.title: Peekaboo
achievements.desc: Become loved by newly sentient beings.

achievements.title: Starry Demise
achievements.desc: Be crushed under the weight of a thousand suns.

achievements.title: So Powerful is the Charm of Words
Your Thirst Is Mine, My Water Is Yours
achievements.desc: Perform the introductory water ritual 100 times.

achievements.title: Biographer
achievements.desc: Learn the complete history of a single sultan.

achievements.title: Oathbreaker
achievements.desc: Violate the sacred covenant of the water ritual.

achievements.title: In Contemplation of Eons
achievements.desc: Perform the water ritual with Oboroqoru, Ape God.

achievements.title: What With the Disembowelment and All
achievements.desc: Find one of Argyve's old apprentices.

achievements.title: Donation Level: Kasaphescence
achievements.desc: Make an offering at the Sacred Well of an artifact worth at least 200 reputation.

achievements.title: Leap, Frog.
achievements.desc: Convince a frog to teach you how to jump.

achievements.title: Mechanimist Reformer
achievements.desc: Convince the High Priest of the Stilt to join your party.

achievements.title: Aaaaaaaaargh!
achievements.desc: Overdose on a hulk honey tonic.

achievements.title: Feast Upon the Goat Hearts! *cheers*
achievements.desc: Perform the water ritual with Mamon Souldrinker.

achievements.title: Rocket Bear
achievements.desc: Equip the Flume-Flier of the Sky-Bear.

achievements.title: Two Cats Are Better Than One
What Are Directions on a Space That Cannot Be Ordered?
achievements.desc: Attain 40 psychic glimmer and discover the vast psychic aether.

achievements.title: There Can Be Only One
achievements.desc: Encode the psionic bits of someone's psyche onto the holographic boundary of your own psyche.

achievements.title: Absolute Unit
achievements.desc: Successfully cook a meal with neutron flux as an ingredient.

achievements.title: Non-Locally Sourced
achievements.desc: Cook a meal with an extradimensional limb as an ingredient.

achievements.title: All Those Who Wander
achievements.desc: Travel to the pocket dimension Tzimtzlum.

achievements.title: The Recitation of the Drowning of Eudoxia by the Witches of Moonhearth
A Clammy Reception
achievements.desc: Enter Mak's clam in the Yd Freehold.

achievements.title: What's Eating the Watervine?
achievements.desc: Complete the quest What's Eating the Watervine?

achievements.title: Belong, Friends
achievements.desc: Help the slynth find a new home.

achievements.title: The Narrowing Sky
achievements.desc: Wear each of the six Faces of the sultanate.

achievements.title: Raisins in the Layer Cake
achievements.desc: Recover a relic from a historic site.

achievements.title: May the Ground Shake But the Six Day Stilt Never Tumble
achievements.desc: Travel to the Six Day Stilt.

achievements.title: Red Rock Hazing Ritual
achievements.desc: Be stoned to death by a baboon on the surface of Red Rock.

achievements.title: Mumblecore
achievements.desc: Learn a secret from the microbiome.

achievements.title: More than a Willing Spirit
achievements.desc: Return from Golgotha with a repaired waydroid and gain admittance to Grit Gate.

achievements.title: Decoding the Signal
achievements.desc: Travel to the Temple of the Rock and decrypt the mysterious signal.

achievements.title: The Earl of Omonporch
achievements.desc: Strike a deal with Asphodel the Lovely for control of the Spindlegrounds.

achievements.title: A Call to Arms
achievements.desc: Defend Grit Gate from the Putus Templar.

achievements.title: Pax Klanq, I Presume?
achievements.desc: Deliver a message to the mushroom prodigy.

achievements.title: Tomb of the Eaters
achievements.desc: Travel to Brightsheol and disable the Spindle's magnetic field.

achievements.title: Reclamation
achievements.desc: Recover the Spindlegrounds from the Putus Templar war party.

achievements.title: Aleph
achievements.desc: Defeat one of the Girsh nephilim.

achievements.title: The Laws of Physics Are Mere Suggestions, Vol. 3
achievements.desc: Prove the information paradox by causing your surroundings to glitch.

achievements.title: Dream within a Dream
achievements.desc: Enter a waking dream from within a waking dream.

achievements.title: Wander Darkling in the Eternal Space
Swollen Bulb
achievements.desc: Consume 10 drams of sunslag in a single playthrough.

achievements.title: Total Makeover
achievements.desc: Pour a dram of pure warm static on yourself.

achievements.title: Oops
achievements.desc: Be killed by a companion on accident.

achievements.title: Then
achievements.desc: Help Chavvah complete the ritual of -elsing and sever Tau at Taproot.

achievements.title: The Comedy
achievements.desc: Settle the dispute in Bey Lah in Eskhind's favor.

achievements.title: The History
achievements.desc: Settle the dispute in Bey Lah in Hindriarch Keh's favor.

achievements.title: The Tragedy
achievements.desc: Settle the dispute in Bey Lah and doom the village.

achievements.title: The Sonnet
achievements.desc: Return the crumpled sheet of paper to its intended recipient or its author.

achievements.title: On Second Thought
achievements.desc: Eat a serving of humble pie.

achievements.title: The Dusted Cosmos
achievements.desc: Leave the solar system on a starship.

achievements.title: Seraphic Heresy
achievements.desc: Spurn Resheph and return to Qud.

achievements.title: The Tillage of the Noosphere
achievements.desc: Accede to Resheph's plan for purging the world of higher life.
